step_rationale: Lymphatic endothelial-identity marker; developmental pathway, not atherothrombotic mechanism.
mechanism: PROX1 is a master regulator of lymphatic endothelial identity and vessel development; role in post-MI recovery independent of atherothrombotic cascade.

references.title: Functions and Regeneration of Mature Cardiac Lymphatic Vessels in Atherosclerosis, Myocardial Infarction, and Heart Failure.
